name: io.github.navapbc/rebar
description: Event-sourced ticket system with a Jira reconciler, exposed as an MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to the repo root that holds the .tickets-tracker store (defaults to the git toplevel of the working dir).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to expose only the read tools (no write/mutation tools).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable the billable LLM tools (review_ticket / review_code / scan_spec / verify_completion / review_plan); off by default.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow the live (mutating) Jira reconcile mode; otherwise reconcile is dry-run only.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport for the MCP server: 'stdio' (default) or 'http' (the optional Streamable-HTTP transport).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Bind host for the Streamable-HTTP transport (default 127.0.0.1).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Bind port for the Streamable-HTTP transport (1-65535; default 8000).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_PATH
environmentVariables.description: URL path the Streamable-HTTP transport serves on (default /mcp).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_ALLOWED_HOSTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of exact host:port values accepted by the Streamable-HTTP DNS-rebinding protection; empty defaults to loopback.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of exact Origin values accepted by the Streamable-HTTP DNS-rebinding protection; empty defaults to loopback.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_TLS_AT_EDGE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to acknowledge TLS is terminated at the edge; required to bind the Streamable-HTTP transport to a non-loopback host.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED_HTTP
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to acknowledge running the Streamable-HTTP transport without a token verifier; required to boot the HTTP transport while auth is off.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable MCP authentication (the composite token verifier + Resource-Server wiring); off by default.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_STRATEGIES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated, ordered list of token-verifier strategies to compose (closed set: static, jwt, introspection, proxy, custom).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_ISSUER_URL
environmentVariables.description: OAuth authorization-server issuer URL advertised in the Protected-Resource Metadata (RFC 9728) when auth is enabled.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_RESOURCE_SERVER_URL
environmentVariables.description: The single resource identifier (RFC 8707 audience) for this server; the composite verifier re-checks every accepted token against it.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_REQUIRED_SCOPES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated scopes a caller must hold; the SDK returns 403 insufficient_scope when a principal lacks one.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_STATIC_TOKENS_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to the JSON secrets file for the static-bearer verifier (stores only SHA-256 digests of the accepted tokens).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_JWKS_URI
environmentVariables.description: HTTPS JWKS endpoint the `jwt` verifier fetches signing keys from (an OIDC provider's .well-known/jwks.json).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_ISSUER
environmentVariables.description: Expected `iss` claim for the `jwt` verifier; falls back to REBAR_MCP_AUTH_ISSUER_URL when unset.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_ALGORITHMS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated PINNED, asymmetric-only JWS algorithms for the `jwt` verifier (default RS256,ES256); a symmetric algorithm on a JWKS source is refused.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_LEEWAY
environmentVariables.description: Clock-skew leeway in seconds applied to exp/nbf validation by the `jwt` verifier (default 60).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_JWKS_REFETCH_COOLDOWN
environmentVariables.description: Minimum seconds between JWKS refetches triggered by an unknown key id (the concurrency-safe flood guard; default 30).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_JWKS_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for the `jwt` verifier's JWKS fetch (default 10).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_EXPECTED_TYP
environmentVariables.description: When set, the `jwt` verifier requires the JWT header `typ` to equal this (e.g. at+JWT per RFC 9068); unset skips the check.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_JWT_ALLOW_PRIVATE_JWKS_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to permit a private/link-local/loopback JWKS host (SSRF guard is on by default); off by default.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_INTROSPECTION_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: The `introspection` verifier's RFC 7662 endpoint URL (must be https://); the opaque token is POSTed here on every request (no caching).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_INTROSPECTION_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: The client id the `introspection` verifier presents to the Authorization Server via HTTP Basic (client_secret_basic).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_INTROSPECTION_CLIENT_SECRET_ENV
environmentVariables.description: The NAME of the env var holding the introspection client secret (never the secret itself); must be present + non-empty at startup or the server refuses to start (fail-closed).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_INTROSPECTION_ALLOW_PRIVATE_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to permit a private/link-local/loopback introspection endpoint host (SSRF guard is on by default); off by default.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_INTROSPECTION_ALLOW_MISSING_AUD
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to accept an active introspection response that OMITS `aud` (many AS do); off by default (fail-closed reject).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_PROXY_SECRET_ENV
environmentVariables.description: The NAME of the env var holding the trusted-proxy shared secret (never the secret itself); must be present + non-empty at startup or the `proxy` verifier refuses to start (fail-closed).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_PROXY_SECRET_HEADER
environmentVariables.description: The header the fronting proxy sends its shared secret on; the identity is trusted only when this matches (constant-time; default x-proxy-auth).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_PROXY_IDENTITY_HEADER
environmentVariables.description: The header carrying the proxy-authenticated principal identity, trusted only when the secret header validates (default x-forwarded-user).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_AUTH_PROXY_SCOPES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated fixed scope set granted to proxy-authenticated principals; empty by default (the principal holds no scopes).
